previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began only fairly.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a long-neck at Kembla Grange Mid Cl1 March 21 over 1000m in soft going defeating She's Assort with 54kg at $8.50. Last start 9th of 12 at Gosford Bm64 on April 2 over 1000m, 5 len behind Zing To Me carrying 56kg at $4.80. Willing to forgive the last run, can atone from the good gate.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start 2nd of 14 at Hawkesbury Mid Bm64 on March 26 over 1100m, long-neck behind Fuadee with 56.5kg at $4. The run before that gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 10 at Hawkesbury Mid Bm64 on March 7 over 1100m, on a slow track; head behind Cavallo Park with 55.5kg at $6. Not far away of late. Capable on her day and near her peak for this.

Began awkwardly. Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
On jumping shifted in and bumped The Bubayaga.

form.formComment: Comes off a 35 day let-up. Last start gave a sight but was run down late 2nd in a small field at Newcastle F&M Bm64 on March 12 over 1200m, nose behind Girijaala carrying 59kg at $4.40. The run before that did the work up front then tired ran last of 8 at Canterbury Mares Bm72 on February 20 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Manukau with 55.5kg at $3.90. Improving mare who shapes as a leading prospect.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start gave a sight but was run down late 3rd of 8 at Gosford F&M Bm64 on April 2 over 1200m, 0.7 len behind Maluku carrying 54kg at $12. Before that won by 1.3 len at Port Macquarie F&M Cl1 March 24 over 1200m on a rain affected track defeating Shelley's Lookout carrying 59.5kg at $5. Thereabouts last time out. Found a bit of form and worth following up.
